testcase.name: test_balanced_macros_within_10_percent

failure.message: AssertionError: ❌ BALANCED MACRO ACCURACY FAILED Day 2 protein: 190.0g vs target 172.0g (10.5% > 10.0%) Day 3 fats: 85.0g vs target 76.0g (11.8% > 10.0%) assert 2 == 0 + where 2 = len(['Day 2 protein: 190.0g vs target 172.0g (10.5% > 10.0%)', 'Day 3 fats: 85.0g vs target 76.0g (11.8% > 10.0%)'])

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: ❌ BALANCED MACRO ACCURACY FAILED Day 2 protein: 190.0g vs target 172.0g (10.5% > 10.0%) Day 3 fats: 85.0g vs target 76.0g (11.8% > 10.0%) assert 2 == 0 + where 2 = len(['Day 2 protein: 190.0g vs target 172.0g (10.5% > 10.0%)', 'Day 3 fats: 85.0g vs target 76.0g (11.8% > 10.0%)'])
